testcase.name: testPriceFilterInvalidRange

failure.message: TC002 FAILED ❌ — BUG-003 CONFIRMED: System accepted Min price (5000) > Max price (100) without any validation error. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: TC002 FAILED ❌ — BUG-003 CONFIRMED: System accepted Min price (5000) > Max price (100) without any validation error. expected [true] but found [false] at
